# DiagramPilot

> DiagramPilot is a local-first, repo-native diagram compiler for AI coding
> agents. It helps agents create, validate, repair, update, render, and export
> diagrams from structured `*.dp.yaml` and `*.dp.json` source files.

DiagramPilot uses DiagramSpec as its source model. A DiagramPilot source file is
the editable artifact. Mermaid, D2, DOT, SVG, and PNG are derived artifacts, not
the primary source of truth.

Public documentation is hosted under `https://diagrampilot.com`.

## Agent Docs

- [Agent quickstart](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/agents/quickstart.md): Minimal workflow for creating, validating, rendering, and exporting diagrams.
- [DiagramSpec](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/agents/spec.md): Structured source model for diagrams.
- [Error repair](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/agents/error-repair.md): How agents should interpret and fix validation errors.
- [Examples](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/agents/examples.md): Canonical diagram examples.
- [MCP tools](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/agents/mcp.md): Planned Model Context Protocol interface after the CLI/core workflow is useful.
- [Prompting guide](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/agents/prompting.md): Recommended instructions for agents using DiagramPilot.

## Development Docs

- [Roadmap](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/development/roadmap.md): MVP phases and priorities.
- [Architecture](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/development/architecture.md): Planned packages, data flow, and constraints.
- [Market research](https://diagrampilot.com/docs/development/market-research.md): Competitive findings and positioning.

## Initial CLI Shape

```bash
diagrampilot init
diagrampilot validate docs/architecture.dp.yaml
diagrampilot validate docs/architecture.dp.yaml --json
diagrampilot render docs/architecture.dp.yaml --out docs/architecture.svg
diagrampilot export docs/architecture.dp.yaml --format mermaid
diagrampilot export docs/architecture.dp.yaml --format d2 --out docs/architecture.d2
```

## MVP Boundaries

- `render` produces SVG and requires `--out`.
- `export` supports Mermaid and D2.
- `export` prints to stdout by default and writes files with `--out`.
- Validation checks source files and returns repairable errors.
- IDs are lowercase snake case and globally unique within a DiagramSpec.
- Icons use namespaced references such as `lucide:database`.
- DOT, PNG, MCP, hosted canvas, and project analyzers are deferred.

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/diagrampilot/diagrampilot): Source repository once public.
- [JSON Schema](https://diagrampilot.com/schema/diagrampilot.schema.json): Planned machine-readable schema for DiagramSpec.
